hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Direct commits to main are not allowed. Create a feature branch and open a PR instead."}'; fi; fi
